scripts.e2e:regression: npm run build:chrome && playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.js specs/regression.spec.js
scripts.e2e:silent: npm run build:chrome && playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.js specs/silent.spec.js
scripts.e2e:smoke: npm run build:chrome && playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.js --grep @smoke
scripts.e2e:quarantine: npm run build:chrome && playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.js specs/quarantine.spec.js --retries=0 --pass-with-no-tests
scripts.lint: eslint tests/e2e/lib/ scripts/e2e-triage-classifier.mjs scripts/e2e-rerun-validator.mjs scripts/e2e-report-issue.mjs scripts/quarantine-append.mjs scripts/promote-from-quarantine.mjs scripts/update-golden.js scripts/run-triage-pipeline.mjs scripts/weekly-digest.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:src && npm run test:chrome && npm run test:firefox && npm run lint && npm run test:lint
